emailVerification.en: An email has been sent to your email address. Please click the link in the email to verify your email address.
emailVerification.sv: En verifieringslänk har skickats till din e-postadress.

noEmailReceived.en: Did you not receive an email?
noEmailReceived.sv: Har du inte fått något e-postmeddelande?

retryInfo.en: Please check your spam folder or enter your email address below and click the button to send a new email.
retryInfo.sv: Vänligen kontrollera din skräppostmapp eller skriv din e-postadress nedan och klicka på knappen för att skicka ett nytt e-postmeddelande.

verifyEmailByClicking.en: Verify your email address by clicking the button below.
verifyEmailByClicking.sv: Verifiera din e-postadress genom att klicka på knappen nedan.
